name: True Crime: Streets of LA
post_apply_message:
True Crime: Streets of LA (2003, Activision, delisted) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34 and sets the resolution.

WIDESCREEN: resolution lives in TrueCrime.ini under [Renderer] as ScreenWidth/ScreenHeight — the recipe sets 1280x800 for the Deck's native panel. Setting a wide resolution gives you the full picture, but note this game renders 16:9/16:10 by expanding the vertical view (Vert-) rather than a true Hor+ widescreen, and the HUD sits at 4:3 anchor points; that's a game limitation, not a misconfig. On an external 16:9 screen, re-apply after changing the two values (or edit the ini directly).

CONTROLLER: native pad support (TrueCrime.ini has a [Controller] block) — Steam Input's default gamepad layout works; the game was built around a controller.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's copy staged at NAS _games/'True Crime - Streets of LA'. TrueCrime.exe (2.8MB) is the only exe. Resolution is [Renderer] ScreenWidth/ScreenHeight in TrueCrime.ini AT THE GAME ROOT (confirmed on disk — arrived set to 1920x1080; recipe overrides to Deck-native 1280x800). This is the first recipe to use the new ini_edit step. Delisted/abandonware (no legit sale channel), so in the fixable lane. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED on hardware as of build.
